title: Upgrade glob

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: [Aikido] Fix security issue in glob via minor version upgrade from 10.4.5 to 10.5.0

summary: Upgrades glob from 10.4.5 to 10.5.0 in the root package.json to address Dependabot security alert #619. Changes are limited to package.json and pnpm-lock.yaml. The bulk of the diff is lockfile churn from dependency resolution changes (jiti version alignment).
maintainerNotes: This PR is superseded by #12853 which was merged on 2026-02-10 and addressed the exact same glob 10.4.5 → 10.5.0 security upgrade (CVE-2025-64756). This PR also has merge conflicts and has been inactive for over 14 months. Safe to close.
